subcodes.first_line: O thou who gazest upon God and drinkest from the chalice of fidelity, hearken unto the call of thy Lord, the Most Exalted, the Most High [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا ایها الناظر الی الله و الشارب عن کاس الوفا ان استمع ندآء ربک العلی الاعلی
subcodes.subjects: @suffering and imprisonment, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @present and future calamities; war; universal convulsion, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @chastisement and requital
